Title: View Agentic Workflow configs in the Actions run summary
EnhancedContent:
You can now view your Agentic Workflow markdown configs directly in the GitHub Actions run summary for any agentic workflow. This update makes it easier to review runs by:

- Reducing the need to switch between pages.
- Showing the exact configuration used when the workflow ran.

For more information about GitHub Agentic Workflows, see [the documentation](https://github.github.com/gh-aw/). To get started, see the [quickstart guide](https://github.github.com/gh-aw/setup/quick-start/).
Author: Allison
